IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[clr_Kafka_GetTopics]') AND type IN (N'FT'))
BEGIN
    DROP FUNCTION [dbo].[clr_Kafka_GetTopics];
END
go

IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[clr_Kafka_CreateTopic]') AND type IN (N'P', N'PC'))
BEGIN
    DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[clr_Kafka_CreateTopic];
END
GO

IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[clr_Kafka_ProduceMessage]') AND type IN (N'P', N'PC'))
BEGIN
    DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[clr_Kafka_ProduceMessage];
END
GO

IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[clr_Kafka_RunConsume]') AND type IN (N'P', N'PC'))
BEGIN
    DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[clr_Kafka_RunConsume];
END
GO

if exists (select 1 from sys.assemblies where name = 'Infinitum.SQL.Kafka')
begin
	drop assembly [Infinitum.SQL.Kafka] 
end
go

if exists (select 1 from sys.assemblies where name = 'Confluent.Kafka')
begin
	drop assembly [Confluent.Kafka] 
end
go

if exists (select 1 from sys.assemblies where name = 'System.Memory')
begin
	drop assembly [System.Memory] 
end
go

if exists (select 1 from sys.assemblies where name = 'System.Buffers')
begin
	drop assembly [System.Buffers] 
end
go

if exists (select 1 from sys.assemblies where name = 'System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe')
begin
	drop assembly [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe] 
end
go

if exists (select 1 from sys.assemblies where name = 'System.Numerics.Vectors')
begin
	drop assembly [System.Numerics.Vectors] 
end
go

create assembly [System.Numerics.Vectors] from 
with permission_set = unsafe
go

create assembly [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe] from 
with permission_set = unsafe
go

create assembly [System.Buffers] from 
with permission_set = unsafe
go

create assembly [System.Memory] from 
with permission_set = unsafe
go

create assembly [Confluent.Kafka] 
from 
with permission_set = unsafe
go

create assembly [Infinitum.SQL.Kafka] 
from 
with permission_set = unsafe
go

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[clr_Kafka_GetTopics]()
RETURNS TABLE (TopicName NVARCHAR(4000), PartitionsCapacity INT, TopicError NVARCHAR(100))
AS EXTERNAL NAME [Infinitum.SQL.Kafka].[Infinitum.SQL.Kafka.Kafka].[GetTopics];
go

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[clr_Kafka_CreateTopic](@TopicName NVARCHAR(100))
AS EXTERNAL NAME [Infinitum.SQL.Kafka].[Infinitum.SQL.Kafka.Kafka].[CreateTopic];
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[clr_Kafka_ProduceMessage](@TopicName NVARCHAR(100), @Key NVARCHAR(100), @Message NVARCHAR(MAX))
AS EXTERNAL NAME [Infinitum.SQL.Kafka].[Infinitum.SQL.Kafka.Kafka].[ProduceMessage];
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[clr_Kafka_RunConsume](@TopicName NVARCHAR(100))
AS EXTERNAL NAME [Infinitum.SQL.Kafka].[Infinitum.SQL.Kafka.Kafka].[RunConsume];
GO
